ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Unique username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user's account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or file path to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief description of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., personal, business, or organization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the image */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Caption text for the image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was posted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was last updated */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., photo, video, or story) */,
  "image_size" INTEGER /* Size of the image in bytes */,
  "image_dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the image (width and height) */,
  "tagged_users" TEXT /* List of users tagged in the image */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the image was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like event */,
  "image_id" TEXT /* ID of the image that was liked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who liked the image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the like occurred */,
  "like_type" TEXT /* Type of like (e.g., heart, thumbs up, or smile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "image_id" TEXT /* ID of the image the comment is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text content of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was made */,
  "comment_reply_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being replied to (if any) */,
  "edited" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the comment has been edited */,
  "edited_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feed entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose feed this entry belongs to */,
  "image_id" TEXT /* ID of the image in the feed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was added to the feed */,
  "feed_type" TEXT /* Type of feed (e.g., main, trending, or hashtag) */,
  "algorithmic_ranking" REAL /* Algorithmic ranking of the image in the feed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feeds_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feeds_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trending" (
  "trending_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trending entry */,
  "image_id" TEXT /* ID of the trending image */,
  "likes_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes on the image */,
  "comments_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image became trending */,
  "trending_ranking" INTEGER /* Ranking of the image in the trending list */,
  "trending_category" TEXT /* Category of the trending list (e.g., photos, videos, or stories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trending_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trending_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "image_id" TEXT /* ID of the image that was reported */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the report */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was made */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, resolved, or dismissed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_follows" (
  "follow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow relationship */,
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who follows */,
  "followed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being followed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the follow occurred */,
  "follow_status" TEXT /* Status of the follow relationship (e.g., pending, accepted, or blocked) */,
  "followed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the follow occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_follows_follower_id FOREIGN KEY ("follower_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_follows_followed_id FOREIGN KEY ("followed_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who receives the notification */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event that triggered the notification */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the notification has been read */,
  "notification_clicked" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the notification has been clicked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "searches" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the search */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* The search query used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the search was performed */,
  "search_results" TEXT /* Results of the search query (e.g., a list of image IDs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_searches_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
